creator: max@stucchi.ch
text:
I found some typos in the announcement page for 12.0-RELEASE. Here is a quick patch to fix them: Index: en_US.ISO8859-1/htdocs/releases/12.0R/announce.xml =================================================================== --- en_US.ISO8859-1/htdocs/releases/12.0R/announce.xml (revision 52672) +++ en_US.ISO8859-1/htdocs/releases/12.0R/announce.xml (working copy) @@ -94,7 +94,7 @@ emulation.

  • -

    The bhyve(8) utility is now able to be run withing +

    The bhyve(8) utility is now able to be run within a jail(8).

  • @@ -241,7 +241,7 @@
    memstick
    -

    This can be written to an USB memory stick (flash drive) +

    This can be written to a USB memory stick (flash drive) and used to do an install on machines capable of booting off USB drives. It also supports booting into a "livefs" based rescue mode. There are no pre-built packages.

    @@ -261,7 +261,7 @@
    mini-memstick
    -

    This can be written to an USB memory stick (flash drive) +

    This can be written to a USB memory stick (flash drive) and used to boot a machine, but does not contain the installation distribution sets on the medium itself, similar to the bootonly image. It also supports booting into
